textByHash.049eb95a9ab5e8c2a7462a53d19d15c98ce5a87b: We won't take any resources from your successes, the resources are all your own.
textByHash.0adf515dd038b15c102450fd5fd48a2db86d4ac6: If you want to learn more, you should be able to find a book in the Grand Library about her.
textByHash.2a47c4f60c119accad3163fec5f055d03551001c: The ore found within these caverns can be rather volatile, especially when heated. We've found that when imbued, this ore can damage her armour.
textByHash.38f2d785bb4bb2f24c789daf16cb88e0271c0ac6: You'll want to head on in and mine the ore from the rocks around the prison. Once you have some, you can heat it using the furnace and then imbue it using the altar.
textByHash.4416ab601ee3a0a73bbe29805d948d0b2da7f637: Oh, hellow adventurer. Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.7344c790cbe4e3d9fd066c76114513bda150a820: We will automatically collect the resources and bestow you with our elven mining knowledge.
textByHash.80831bb18435a5825c6ea5faadb06da10235c787: This is the prison of Zalcano.
textByHash.8c49f24c142cc8f55890e07cbd38abb0444d43f4: Well we could always use some help in keeping Zalcano under control.
textByHash.90bb091d50fac5feb26e6c8a34d09de48a7e9615: That said, when she's vulnerable, you can still do some damage to her if you use a pickaxe.
textByHash.959b2e57dced7323308faa760cede7f435d88296: Don't worry, the curse only affects her. Because of it, her entire body has been turned to stone.
textByHash.9e0a3e375d42ae4030b35bf71b43dc5707a698be: Once you've got some imbued ore, just give it a throw her way and she'll definitely feel it.
textByHash.a8a9ab9a669e3d168cea02d324faca75091faa91: Zalcano is formed completely from stone. Because of this, normal weapons won't work on her.
textByHash.bb7099b157292a124ba7a4bf3d88c56cdb761c02: Well assuming you are successful of subdueing Zalcano, she has accumulated a lot of ores and magical runes from her time as a demon.
textByHash.d0f77102709c102b7aa3d38e039804c1b7c3e3db: Well we would always appreciate these resources, in exchange we could bestow upon you our elven knowledge for mining.
textByHash.d417ab49e31f81fadc146c75bd165ec414e10909: We wouldn't be asking for anything special though, just the common resources are what we require.
textByHash.dd241fadb13f9f3ccf23fb54523268ea556e18a5: Is there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.efb95a650dc537b7d80179368f502ea04ff5a384: That's right. She's a powerful demon, one bearing an ancient curse.
textByHash.fc8d36abd4577ee7a9ec781855f22c811a2305c0: She came to our lands long ago, before the curse had fully taken hold. We imprisoned her here for study, so that we might learn more about her affliction.
